36:65.arabic: الْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَى أَفْوَاهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَا أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ
36:65.english: This Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.
36:65.score_notes: From Surah Yasin — high familiarity. Vivid Day of Judgment imagery: feet testify. Strong future practice candidate.

lesson_use.rejection_reason: Teacher preferred 5:117 (Isa's personal testimony) over this for Learn 5. Priority for Lesson 3+ practice.
